title: ESIC Teaching Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 41 Posts
short_info: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Teaching Faculty (Broad Specialty Department) Notification 2026 has been released on 21 May 2026 on the official website ESIC. A total of 41 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Teaching Faculty (Broad Specialty Department) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Maximum age limit is 69 years.

qualification.education_qualification: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines, NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025 will apply
qualification.details: Professor: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines. NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025 will apply. Associate Professor: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines. NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025 will apply. Assistant Professor: As per latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines. NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025 will apply.

salary_details.details: Professor: Consolidated pay ₹2,60,226/- per month Associate Professor: Consolidated pay ₹1,73,045/- per month Assistant Professor: Consolidated pay ₹1,48,669/- per month

selection_process: Based on academic credentials and interview performance

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Teaching Faculty posts at ESIC Medical College & Hospital Faridabad is scheduled for 29th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time with all necessary documents.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Teaching Faculty posts at ESIC Faridabad?
faq.answer: There are a total of 41 vacancies for Teaching Faculty (Broad Specialty Department) posts. These positions are categorized into Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor roles.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Teaching Faculty posts is 69 years. There are no specific minimum age limits mentioned for these positions in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the ESIC Teaching Faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is ₹500. However, SC, ST, and Women candidates are exempted from paying any application fee for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: The salary varies based on the post. Assistant Professors can expect a consolidated pay of ₹1,48,669/- per month, Associate Professors ₹1,73,045/- per month, and Professors ₹2,60,226/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What are the qualification requirements for the Teaching Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The qualifications must be as per the latest NMC (National Medical Commission) guidelines, specifically referencing the NMC Notification (30/06/2025) on Medical Institutions (Qualification of Faculty) Regulations 2025.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the ESIC Teaching Faculty positions?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in recruitment. Interested and eligible candidates need to attend the walk-in interview on the specified date with all required original documents and photocopies.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the ESIC Medical College & Hospital located in Faridabad?
faq.answer: ESIC Medical College & Hospital is located in Faridabad, Haryana, with the pincode 121001. The exact venue for the walk-in interview will be detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on the candidates' academic credentials and their performance during the interview. This ensures a comprehensive evaluation of their suitability.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for these Teaching Faculty positions is on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the terms and conditions of the contract.
